overview.Name: Acadia Healthcare Company Inc
overview.Description: Acadia Healthcare Company, Inc. develops and operates inpatient psychiatric facilities, residential treatment centers, group homes, substance abuse facilities, and outpatient behavioral health facilities to serve the behavioral health and recovery needs of the communities in the United States. United States and Puerto Rico. The company is headquartered in Franklin, Tennessee.
overview.Address: 4020 ASPEN GROVE DRIVE, FRANKLIN, TN, UNITED STATES, 37067
